hero.headline: Straight From the Island.
hero.subheadline: Handcrafted Jamaican juices made with real fruit, real culture, and real love. No fillers. No nonsense.

offers.title: First Order Deal
offers.description: Get 20% off your first order when you sign up for SMS updates.

offers.title: Detox Bundle
offers.description: 2× Activated Detox + 1× Blue Lagoon. Reset your body, island style.

offers.title: Hibiscus Special
offers.description: Our Hibiscus Pineapple Punch is selling fast. Get yours before it's gone.

about.headline: Born in Jamaica. Bottled with Love.
about.story: Every bottle starts with a memory — the mango tree in Grandma's yard, market days in Kingston, the sorrel she'd brew every Christmas. We took those memories and turned them into something you can taste.
about.mission: Our mission is simple: bring authentic Jamaican flavors to your table using only whole fruits, traditional recipes, and zero shortcuts.
about.founderBio: Started from a family kitchen in 2021, now serving thousands of juice lovers across the region. Every batch is made fresh, every order is personal.

testimonials.name: Deja W.
testimonials.text: The Blue Lagoon is EVERYTHING. I've never seen anything so beautiful and it tastes even better than it looks.

testimonials.name: Marcus T.
testimonials.text: The Hibiscus Punch reminds me of sorrel back home. My whole family is obsessed.

testimonials.name: Sarah K.
testimonials.text: I do the Activated Detox every Monday. It's become a ritual. Honestly changed my relationship with wellness.

testimonials.name: Calvin R.
testimonials.text: Cane & Coconut is elite. I ordered 3 bottles and they were gone before I got home.

testimonials.name: Aisha M.
testimonials.text: The subscription saves me every week. Fresh juice without thinking about it — what more could you want?

testimonials.name: Devon P.
testimonials.text: 10/10 no notes. Best juice I've had outside of Jamaica. Fast delivery too.
